title: Honeywell UOP eFining Technology Named ERTC Energy Transition Solution of the Year
content: Honeywell announced that its UOP eFining technology won the Energy Transition Solution of the Year award at the World Refining Associationâ€™s European Refining Technology Conference, recognizing projects that modernize refining to produce lowâ€‘carbon fuels such as green hydrogen and biofuels. The advanced eFuel technology merges green hydrogen and carbon dioxide to make eMethanol, which can be converted into eSAF, eGasoline, and eDiesel, providing lowerâ€‘carbon fuel options for multiple industries. With sustainable aviation fuel demand projected to rise to 7.6 billion gallons over the next decade, Honeywell highlights eFining as part of its endâ€‘toâ€‘end solutions that integrate into existing refinery systems to help boost SAF production while addressing feedstock and cost challenges. According to Honeywell, the eFining process enables aviation fuel production from methanol with up to 88 percent lower greenhouse gas emissions compared to conventional jet fuel, and complements a broader renewable fuels portfolio including Ecofining, Ethanol to Jet, FT Unicracking, and Biocrude Upgrading.
author: Analysts Account
